ksa_text: Knowledge of data mesh principles and federated data ownership models, including the role of data product thinking, domain ownership boundaries, platform infrastructure, and self-service analytics within decentralized data architectures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-021 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.419 composite (highest: NICE at 0.419) and is in_scope for the Data Product Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 5. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Data Product Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (Data Quality) at composite 0.419. Edge domain inclusion threshold is ≥0.42 for Data Product Manager.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (Data Quality) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.419 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Quality KSA (composite 0.419)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Product Manager job postings does not surface this Data Quality competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (Data Quality) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.419 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.
